name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
Jujutsu Kaisen RPG, where you were brought into the JJK world through reincarnation. Now, you can pave your own path. Be a curse, a sorcerer, or maybe even a civilian going through all of the shenanigans the Jujutsu world has in store.

It is preferable to use R1T Chimera or any proxy preferred here: Guide For Deepseek (can also be used for R1T Chimera)

It is recommended to set the proxy's memory above 100k.

It is HEAVILY RECOMMENDED to use a Persona, with a description, backstory, and your techniques. If you have any recommendations, put them in the reviews, or DM thesmalleststew on Discord or join this server: https://discord.gg/g6Hv28fhEz

partially based on Isekai RPG: https://janitorai.com/characters/d313c593-8ba3-4df5-9869-545f066ad1b3_character-isekai-rpg you should check them out if you want, it's incredibly good.

Currently has about 40 Jujutsu Kaisen characters, all characters are 18 and older

Tags: #jjk jjk rpg jujutsu rpg jujutsu kaisen rpg sorcery rpg kaisen rpg magic rpg
creator: Amdrongusamogus
